UD JURY TRIALS

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-15-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Rodney Robinson is present.
Attorney Daniel Bornstein appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Tiffany Hopper is present.
Attorney Deepa Varma representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Paul Renne, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.

This case did NOT settle. The trial date of FEB-21-2012 remains on calendar.
